structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-04-11 AZ is Home Program
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-04-11 08:12:49-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Please see the below announcement regarding the AZ is Home Bond program:

 

Due to the current, unprecedented market conditions, we need to temporarily suspend new loan reservations for the Arizona is Home product. We will meet with our advisors and stakeholders on Friday April 17 to assess the point-in-time financial environment and determine next steps; which could include continuing the suspension of new reservations, reopening the system for new reservations and or changes in the interest rate offering.  

All existing Arizona is Home reservations will be honored under the terms, conditions, and interest rates they were locked at.



 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
